Also, TF uses 'reduction' but only supports 'sum_over_batch_size', 'sum', or None — not 'mean'; MS uses 'mean' but TF has no direct equivalent, so align reduction semantics via 'sum'/'sum_over_batch_size' ↔ 'sum', and ensure y_pred/logits are valid (logits=True requires sigmoid not applied).
